message:
fix(rule): Sanitize newlines in rule titles to prevent layout breakage

Rule titles containing newline characters would cause broken terminal
rendering because the rule line would be split across multiple lines.
This adds sanitization to replace embedded newlines with spaces before
measuring or rendering the title.

Discovered while rendering markdown content with unexpected line breaks
in headers that were used as rule titles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
